stimulus:
Before we start, we need to ask you some personal questions.

Please note that all data is anonymized. You will be paid for your time regardless of your answers.

Before we begin, we need to check your color vision.
Please select the digit you see in the picture.

Quick Reminder

  • There are 3 luck machines: Blue (↑ Up), Green (← Left), Red (→ Right)
  • Each turn, 2 machines are READY and 1 is unavailable (shown as a colored outline)
  • Press the corresponding arrow key to activate a READY machine
  • Activating an unavailable machine: lose your turn + time penalty
  • Activating a READY machine: 50% win +£0.05 / 50% lose −£0.05
  • Time limit: 6 seconds per turn — don’t miss your chance!
  • Goal: Quickly activate READY machines, avoid unavailable ones

response: {"q_total_machines":"3","q_ready_machines":"2","q_blue_key":"↑ Up arrow key","q_red_key":"→ Right arrow key","q_outcome":"The red machine is unavailable. I will lose my turn and chance to win coins, and get a time penalty.","q_ready_outcome":"I will either win a coin (+0.05£) or lose a coin (−0.05£).","q_goal":"My goal is to quickly activate available luck machines, avoiding unavailable machines. If I am lucky, I will get rewarded.","q_win_rates":"Red: 50% win rate — Blue: 50% win rate — Green: 50% win rate"}
